data.description:
Until the start of your next turn, when a target succeeds on a Check that includes
@DATA[key.attributeLocal] @ICON[@DATA[key.attribute]] and that Check allows them to advance or turn back a Clock, they may fill or erase an additional section of that Clock.

Targets Receive: @EFFECT[Compendium.projectfu.skills.Item.qXzGUkZdWpUyGpOI], @EFFECT[Compendium.projectfu.skills.Item.wh8fZahZ7aUwP2RT], @EFFECT[Compendium.projectfu.skills.Item.TQr3tB2cxAVUCYUh], or @EFFECT[Compendium.projectfu.skills.Item.c5XHYaYaBv0NJ7Z0]
